effect: Backlog stops being chat memory; c-suite and maintenance reports gain usable signal
notes: Chief of Staff: first process priority from CEO vision; no new governance layer.
target: ideas -> targets -> backlog -> execution -> review become repo artifacts
title: Seed canonical executable backlog

effect: Each promoted idea maps to a durable target with owner Facet and review cadence
notes: Chief of Staff: design before build; target ledger enables backlog prioritization.
target: ideas score against explicit repo goals, not vibes
title: Design minimal target ledger

effect: Executive review produces idea records with owner, target, state, check, and decision status
notes: Chief of Staff: closes meeting-theater gap.
target: board output becomes durable repo truth
title: Make c-suite decisions persist backlog records

effect: Worktrees and issues start only from shaped, testable records
notes: Chief of Staff: keeps process cheap and executable.
target: no execution until idea has owner Facet, target, check, reversibility
title: Tighten backlog readiness gate

effect: Weekly hygiene surfaces backlog health without always-on services
notes: Chief of Staff: maintenance owns recurring process hygiene.
target: repo self-regulates stale ideas, missing targets, and drift
title: Add maintenance priority report

effect: Done work records expected vs actual effect so future c-suite calls improve
notes: Chief of Staff: defer until seeded backlog has one completed item.
park_reason: CFO loop: defer until seeded backlog item completes; outcome reviews need actual execution evidence.
target: execution -> review closes the autonomy loop
title: Add lightweight outcome review loop

effect: Ideas can be filtered by go-live cost, maintenance overhead, check cost, tool sprawl, and reversibility
notes: CFO loop: cheap control layer before queue automation.
target: cost and reversibility become durable backlog facts
title: Add minimal cost fields to ideas

effect: agent_check rejects malformed Facet manifests before ownership and routing drift
notes: CTO c-suite loop: schema guardrails before more Facets/process.
target: Facet contracts remain load-bearing, explicit, and cheap to validate
title: Tighten Facet manifest schema validation

effect: Tests catch accidental fallback paths in tools before they become implicit contracts
notes: CTO c-suite loop: preserve no-fallback rule while allowing cache/credential exceptions.
target: Internal repo machinery has one explicit source of truth and fails loudly
title: Add no-fallback contract tests for internal machinery

effect: ideas report can show cost-heavy, low-reversibility, or tool-sprawl risks from JSONL
notes: CFO loop: report after fields exist; no new scheduler.
target: weekly hygiene sees expensive or high-overhead backlog drift
title: Add ideas cost report

effect: Budget model captures cron count, closeout checks, command count, generated files, and expected maintenance burden
notes: CFO loop: park enforcement until seeded backlog plus one outcome review exists.
target: Facet sprawl stays visible without early enforcement
title: Sketch Facet maintenance budgets

effect: Template value becomes visible immediately after initialize; new Products start with repo-local operating loop instead of blank process
notes: CPO loop 1: strengthens Product/Template value; design after target ledger shape.
target: Product forks inherit usable idea targets and review cadence at initialize time
title: Add Product-fork operating seed pack

effect: c-suite outputs can name accountable process roles without relying on transcript memory
notes: Chief of Staff loop 1: process metadata needed before autonomous handoff.
target: priority decisions have driver, approver, contributors, and informed Facets as repo truth
title: Add DACI metadata to idea records

effect: weekly hygiene and c-suite context packet expose unresolved decisions and their owner Facets
notes: Chief of Staff loop 1: blocked decisions need recurring visibility, not new scheduler.
target: decision_required items surface during maintenance before blocking execution flow
title: Report blocked decisions in backlog hygiene
